svg.title: Restaurant Dashboard Composition
svg.desc: Static visual grid containing charts and visual blocks.

text.font-family: Aptos, Calibri, 'Segoe UI', Candara, Arial, sans-serif
Aptos, Calibri, 'Segoe UI', Candara, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Reports, order status, customers, occupation, and weekly trend panels.

svg.title: Reports
svg.desc: Reports with 1 data series: Earnings and bills.

text.font-family: Aptos, Calibri, 'Segoe UI', Candara, Arial, sans-serif

svg.title: Order Status
svg.desc: Order Status with 3 data series: Earnings, Preparing, Served.

Aptos, Calibri, 'Segoe UI', Candara, Arial, sans-serif

svg.title: Customers
svg.desc: Customers with 11 data series: R1, R2, R3, R4, R5, R6, R7, R8, R9, R10, R11.
